title: polypodium fauriei
intro: Polypodium fauriei, also known as the Korean polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an anti-arthritic agent. In traditional herbal preparations, Polypodium fauriei is often made into a tea or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions.
